calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Feb-04-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing-Quiet Title of Real Property this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maura Balducchi.
Glen Shea, Esq. for Plaintiff: Shang-Tzu Hwu, present with witness: Alice Lee, were sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented and considered the declaration in file the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Chicago Title Co. and Wing Tak Chan.
Quieting Title for the real property described as 950 Stockton St. ,#201, San Francisco and Deed of Trust is declared cancelled and void.
Costs against Defendant: Wing Tak Chan for the amount of $1,543.62. See scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan on Feb. 4, 2005.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2004 Continued To Feb-25-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
